use_cases: Landing page main hero section with animated rotating headline text
Product launch marketing pages with engaging animated typography
SaaS landing pages requiring dynamic word-based headline animations
Marketing sites needing smooth spring-based text transitions
ai_summary: A dynamic hero component featuring an animated rotating headline that cycles through descriptive words with smooth spring-based transitions. The component includes a CTA button, responsive typography scaling, and uses Framer Motion for fluid text morphing effects. Designed for SaaS and product marketing landing pages where engaging animated typography helps capture visitor attention.
